case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $42,079 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATIVE OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS. INTERESTED PARTY: HAI HA FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HA, HAI HA, HAO HA, HENRY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $18,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY JOHN FORSYTH ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS HOA HA, HAI HA AND HENRY HA. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $24,079.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
